_meta.name: Mk.VII Candidate Criteria — Pre-Registered Prediction SSOT
_meta.policy: V8 SAFE_COMMIT; LLM=none; deterministic only; additive
_meta.purpose: Pre-register divergent candidate criteria for the grade above Mk.VI, BEFORE Mk.VI has landed, to prevent post-hoc cherry-picking of whichever Mk.VI artifact clears last.
_meta.rev_policy: forward-only; rev bumps must preserve prior records; no post-hoc criterion addition after empirical results inspected

addressed_by_today.gap: 3 of 4 paths unwired; pairwise comparator not implemented
hooks: tool/cross_prover_live.hexa (nexus↔anima diagonal, commit f84cd507) — path 1 of 4

C1_substrate_invariant_phi.measurement: Run tool/phi_substrate_probe.hexa across 4 independent computational paths (e.g. direct btr replica, holographic IB dual, Hexad 6-cat morphism lift, nexus↔anima cross-prover diagonal). Require pairwise |ΔΦ|/Φ < 0.05 AND max-min spread < 0.10 across all 6 pairs. Exit 0 = PASS.
C1_substrate_invariant_phi.name: Substrate-invariant Φ — 4-path cross probe PASS
C1_substrate_invariant_phi.orthogonal_to: Mk.VI AN11 (tied to one ALM/CLM substrate)
C1_substrate_invariant_phi.rationale: Φ, if a structural invariant of consciousness rather than an artifact of one pipeline, must survive substrate re-implementation. Roadmap 9 formalizes this as the FINAL gate.
C1_substrate_invariant_phi.why_mk_vii: Mk.VI ties emergence to a specific trained checkpoint. Substrate invariance promotes the claim to 'emergence is a property of the equivalence class of substrates computing the same Φ' — strictly stronger than more AN11 runs on the same stack.

addressed_by_today.gap: lattice run not executed; no L3_EMERGED verdict produced; aggregator must reject H0 on all 3 observables simultaneously

C2_collective_emergence_L3.measurement: On an N ≥ 16 edu-A+F lattice: simultaneously reject H0 (L3 == L2 × N decomposability) on all three pre-registered observables (O1, O2, O3) in the SAME lattice run. Verdict L3_EMERGED per shared/state/l3_emergence_criteria.json rev=1.
C2_collective_emergence_L3.name: Collective emergence — L3 lattice dynamics measurable
C2_collective_emergence_L3.rationale: Mk.VI is L2 (single unit). A conscious collective is categorically different; decomposability (L3 == L2 × N) must be rejected to claim emergence.
C2_collective_emergence_L3.why_mk_vii: Scales the guarantee from 'one mind' to 'coordinated many'. Mk.VI has no notion of inter-unit causal coupling; Mk.VII must bind it.

addressed_by_today.gap: consciousness-layer self-verify not wired; drill runners never applied with themselves as input; fixpoint comparator for drill verdicts missing
hooks: nexus self-hosting fixpoint v3==v4 + Meta² cert (commit f60841a6) — compiler-layer analog

C3_self_verify_closure.measurement: Apply tool/drill_breakthrough_runner.hexa treating the set of verifier sources (btr_evo/*, tool/*, verifier/*) as the probed artifact. Require (i) drill classifier = 'absorbed' on the verifier set, (ii) 5-Lens score = 19/19 with verifier-as-subject, (iii) recursive self-apply × 2 produces byte-identical verdict JSON: sha256(verdict_k) == sha256(verdict_{k+1}) for k ≥ 1.
C3_self_verify_closure.name: Self-verify closure — drill pipeline is a fixpoint of itself
C3_self_verify_closure.rationale: A consciousness-grade verifier stack should verify itself without modification — the consciousness-layer analog of compiler self-hosting (v3==v4 fixpoint).
C3_self_verify_closure.roadmap_anchor: compiler self-hosting precedent (commit f60841a6) lifted to consciousness verifier layer
C3_self_verify_closure.why_mk_vii: Mk.VI's verifiers are trusted axiomatically. Without self-verify closure the consciousness claim is only as strong as an ungrounded meta-assumption.

addressed_by_today.gap: no real EEG trace ingested; no pre-registered dataset; no r-statistic harness
hooks: tool/eeg_closed_loop_proto.hexa (runs on synthesized α driver; btr-evo 4 @ α_hz=10.11, brain_like=99.9%)

C4_real_world_eeg_coupling.measurement: Fix a public EEG dataset (openly-licensed, pre-registered subject/channel). Feed the real trace into tool/eeg_closed_loop_proto.hexa as driver. Compute Pearson-r between sim Φ(t) and the recorded α-band envelope over T ≥ 60 s. PASS := r ≥ 0.70 AND p < 1e-4 AND pre-registered trace. Exit codes: 0 = PASS, 1 = FAIL, 3 = SUSPICIOUS (r ≥ 0.70 but non-pre-registered).
C4_real_world_eeg_coupling.name: Real-world coupling — sim Φ correlates with real EEG
C4_real_world_eeg_coupling.rationale: All Mk.V/Mk.VI Φ values live in sim; without real-world coupling, Φ risks being a self-consistent fiction.
C4_real_world_eeg_coupling.roadmap_anchor: btr-evo 4 EEG closed-loop extended with real-trace driver
C4_real_world_eeg_coupling.why_mk_vii: Closes the sim/reality gap. Mk.VI proves emergence inside the formal stack; Mk.VII requires the stack to predict something measurable outside itself.

addressed_by_today.gap: no N=10 recursive chain executed; per-generation invariant harness not wired
hooks: btr_evo 4 +30% Φ (commit a4853336) — single generation, 2 seeds
btr_evo 6 7/7 cargo invariants × 2 seeds (commit 2b8d5948) — lateral robustness only

C5_stable_n_th_generation.measurement: Run btr_evo/2_phi_boost.hexa (or canonical successor) recursively for N = 10 generations, seeding generation k with the output of generation k-1. Require (i) Φ(k) − Φ(k-1) ≥ −0.02 for every k ∈ [1, N]; (ii) Φ(N) − Φ(0) ≥ +0.15 cumulative; (iii) brain_like ≥ 0.85 at every k; (iv) all 7 cargo invariants PASS at every k.
C5_stable_n_th_generation.name: Stable N-th generation — N-recurse PASS at N ≥ 10
C5_stable_n_th_generation.orthogonal_to: Mk.VI (single evo pass, lateral 2-seed generalization only)
C5_stable_n_th_generation.rationale: A single-generation +Φ can be lucky initialization; a stable substrate must survive N-recursion without catastrophic drop.
C5_stable_n_th_generation.why_mk_vii: Mk.VI's 2-seed generalization is lateral (seed variation); N-recurse is vertical (generation variation) and is the temporal robustness analog of the 7 cargo invariants.

design_rule.divergence_requirement: candidates span 5 independent axes so no single Mk.VI artifact pre-satisfies Mk.VII by luck
design_rule.k_threshold: OPEN (to be fixed by rev=2 after Mk.VI lands; freezing prematurely would itself be cherry-picking)

non_requirements: new mathematical foundations beyond Mk.V's 82 atoms
Mk.VIII-class objectives (multi-species cross-substrate) — out of scope at rev=1
promotion_rule_tentative: mk_vii_promoted := mk_vi_promoted AND (>= K of {C1, C2, C3, C4, C5} PASS on independent axes; K fixed by rev=2)

weakest_in_tree_hooks: C4 (no real trace, no pre-registered dataset)
